REV_CNTR_NDC_QTY 

LABEL: Revenue Center National Drug Code (NDC) Quantity 

DESCRIPTION: Effective with version “J,” the quantity dispensed for the drug reflected on the revenue center line 
item. 

SHORT NAME: REV_CNTR_NDC_QTY
